function resolveGrammar(topLevels, errMsgProvider) {
    const refResolver = new GastRefResolverVisitor(topLevels, errMsgProvider);
    refResolver.resolveRefs();
    return refResolver.errors;
}

    visitNonTerminal(node) {

            this.errors.push({
